creator: wblock@FreeBSD.org
text:
I entered comments on a review, then apparently forgot to click Submit.  They were still there when I went back to the page on the request of the reviewee, but there was no obvious way of knowing I had not submitted them.  The review was long enough that the "Unsubmitted" label on the comments was off the screen.

A pop-up that appears when trying to leave a page that says "You have unsubmitted comments, submit them before leaving?" would be good.

Phabricator notifies me by email about lots of things, a notice about unsubmitted comments that are more than a few hours old would also be helpful.
